title: Serious villagers
body:
Changes villagers faces to look a little bit more serious.

Even if it says that the pack is outdated, it should work on all versions

This was a fun project because I made the entire thing while on the bus

You can submit bugs or suggestions [here](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeELpo_gqlwn4ftgP_tkB6I-rq6c6nyvs4BM07e89AKy3DI2g/viewform?usp=sf_link)

![The almighty one](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6cFWU4xJ/images/566edde04392fb03f3f0a9e5089d42309c5b1115.jpeg)
